claim_warnings: Synthetic-only evidence validates schema and local routing behavior.
Synthetic-only evidence does not prove real provider cost reduction.
Synthetic-only evidence does not prove real GPU workload reduction.
Synthetic-only evidence does not prove production latency reduction.
Baseline-vs-KORA comparison is synthetic and uses placeholder costs only.
Comparison output must not be used as real provider, GPU, or infrastructure savings evidence.
